title: Deliciously Dense Norwegian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and aromatic Norwegian lamb stew featuring tender lamb, root vegetables, and a rich render-fat broth, perfect for special occasions and cold winter nights.
instructions: Heat the rendered lamb fat in a large wok over medium-high heat until it starts to smoke.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to caramelize, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic, dried thyme, ground black pepper, and salt, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the water to the wok and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
